channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月15日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Agnes Callard’s theory of the uni-context #2 Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you) #3 Beautiful Type Erasure with C++26 Reflection #4 Demis Hassabis has a plan to harness AI safely #5 Show HN: Juggler – an open-source GUI coding agent, by the creator of JUCE #6 Proof of Care in the Age of A.I #7 Punch yourself in the face with reality #8 Paxos Made Simple (2001)[pdf] #9 Coding agents think ahead of time #10 New York becomes the first state to impose a data center moratorium

item.title: 2026年7月14日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 The art and engineering of Sega CD Silpheed #2 Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor #3 A voxel Tokyo in real Japan time – ride the Yamanote line and study Japanese #4 Grok uploaded my user directory to xAI's servers #5 LAPD lets contract with surveillance giant Flock expire #6 DOGE is done. What happened to its records? #7 Precursor #8 Show HN: DOM-docx – HTML to native, editable Word docs (MIT) #9 Grok CLI uploaded the whole home directory to GCS #10 The 'absolute magic' of Morse code that still connects people globally

item.title: 2026年7月14日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Japan develops a method to recover up to 90% of lithium from used EV batteries #2 Fundamentals of Wireless Communication (2005) #3 The Git history command deserves more attention #4 YouTrackDB is a general-use object-oriented graph database #5 Building and shipping Mac and iOS apps without opening Xcode #6 How to build a circular LCD clock #7 The Economics of Recursive Self-Improvement [pdf] #8 Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor #9 Satellite Tracker – Live Map of Starlink and 30k Satellites #10 An Englishwoman who sketched India before photography took hold

item.title: 2026年7月14日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Building and Shipping Mac and iOS Apps Without Ever Opening Xcode #2 Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor #3 Show HN: YouTube Guitar Tab Parser #4 Claude is just Mr. Meeseeks #5 Linux 0.11 rewritten in idiomatic Rust, boots in QEMU #6 Linux on the Sega 32X. Who needs hardware synchronization primitives anyway? #7 The art and engineering of Sega CD Silpheed #8 Climate.gov was destroyed. Open data saved it #9 Telegram's t.me domain has been suspended #10 SalesPatriot (YC W25) Is Hiring Full Stack Engineers (SF)

item.title: 2026年7月13日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Old and new apps, via modern coding agents by Terry Tao #2 AI Boosts Research Careers but Flattens Scientific Discovery #3 Understanding the Odin Programming Language #4 Gina Gallery of International Naive Art #5 Yt-Dlp Sequence Diagrams #6 Ghostel.el: Terminal emulator powered by libghostty #7 Unauthenticated RCE in Motorola's MR2600 Router #8 Vint Cerf, a “father of the Internet”, is retiring #9 Show HN: Mindwalk – Replay coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase #10 Mesh LLM: distributed AI computing on iroh

item.title: 2026年7月13日（12:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Beavis Ultrasound PnP ISA Sound Card Replica #2 GhostLock, a stack-UAF that has existed in all Linux distributions for 15 years #3 Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles #4 Cyberpunk Comics, Manga and Graphic Novels #5 Tiny Emulators #6 So you want to learn physics (second edition, 2021) #7 Designing and assembling my first PCB #8 First look at Quest, the final ship of Antarctic explorer Shackleton #9 Are you telling me a readonly property is wrecking my performance? #10 Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (July 2026)
